description: Flexibits makes productivity apps including Fantastical, a calendar and scheduling app, and Cardhop, a contacts app. Its products support account-based features like scheduling, proposals, RSVP workflows, and related automations.
summary: Flexibits exposes a small public integration surface: a Fantastical API used via Zapier with a user-generated API key, a Fantastical MCP connector for Claude on macOS, and local app automation via Fantastical/Cardhop URL schemes and AppleScript; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/CLI docs were found.

surfaces.name: Fantastical URL scheme and AppleScript automation
Cardhop URL scheme and AppleScript automation
